description: Graphic built from a screenshot of an ABC 7News ('ON YOUR SIDE') online news article with an added handwritten-style overlay. At the top is the navy ABC7 News header bar with a hamburger menu icon. The black bold headline reads 'SEE IT: Historic DC fountain flows again after 7 years', with a red, slanted handwritten-marker overlay across the lower-right of the headline reading 'Thanks to President Donald J. Trump!'. Below are the byline 'by Jessica James | Mon, May 18, 2026 at 1:11 PM', an updated timestamp, and a paragraph: 'WASHINGTON (7News) — Water is flowing again at some of Washington's historic fountains, including a major landmark in Meridian Hill Park.' The lower half is a color photograph of a multi-tiered cascading fountain with flowing water, stone arches, green trees, and a person standing at the basin.
notable_text: SEE IT: Historic DC fountain flows again after 7 years / Thanks to President Donald J. Trump!
